About.title: About ITfix
About.subtitle: Your trusted local IT partner in Boca Raton and South Florida

story.title: Our Story
story.founded: ITfix was founded in Boca Raton, South Florida with a simple but powerful idea: technology should work for you, not against you.
story.mission: Our mission is making technology accessible, reliable, and stress-free for everyone — whether you're running a business or managing a smart home.
story.audience: We serve small businesses, homeowners, and anyone in South Florida who needs dependable IT support they can count on.
story.bilingual: Our team is fully bilingual (English/Russian), so you can communicate in the language you're most comfortable with.

localPresence.title: Local Presence
localPresence.description: We're right here in Boca Raton — not a call center overseas. Face-to-face service when you need it.

fastResponse.title: Fast Response
fastResponse.description: Same-day service available for urgent issues. We know downtime costs money and peace of mind.

transparentPricing.title: Transparent Pricing
transparentPricing.description: No hidden fees or surprise charges. You'll always know the cost before we start any work.

ongoingSupport.title: Ongoing Support
ongoingSupport.description: We don't just fix problems and leave. We build long-term relationships and provide continuous support.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: We show up when we say we will and deliver what we promise.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Deep technical knowledge across all areas of IT and home technology.

customerFirst.title: Customer First
customerFirst.description: Every decision we make starts with your needs and your experience.

continuousLearning.title: Continuous Learning
continuousLearning.description: Technology evolves fast — we stay ahead so you don't have to.

cta.title: Let's Work Together
cta.subtitle: Whether you need a one-time fix or ongoing IT support, we're here to help. Reach out today.
